creator: coredump@nervosa.vendetta.com
text:
ctags usage prompt doesnt include a linefeed.

Fix: 

Add a simple \n to the main usage() strings in ctags.c
How-To-Repeat: 
[coredump@nervosa] ~> ctags
usage: ctags [-BFadtuwvx] [-f tagsfile] file ...[coredump@nervosa] ~>
[coredump@nervosa] ~> cut
usage:  cut -c list [file1 ...]
        cut -f list [-s] [-d delim] [file ...]
[coredump@nervosa] ~>
